meaning: n.佛罗伦萨人,绫的一种adj.意大利佛罗伦萨的,佛罗伦萨画派的
examples: He was extolled as the founder of their Florentine school.
But these same materials, which so suited the massive Etruscan style, were effectively used by the Florentine Renaissance to create the most delicate and graceful of styles.
This Florentine, best known for his political and philosophical writings, was also a comedic playwright.
Like that other great Florentine family, the Medicis, the Guccis produced great beauty and great soap opera.
